batch_summary.note: Jun-Jul 2024. S-006: Melissa reports bruises from Milo throwing water balloons at Olivia (Jun 17, 2024) — delivered in hostile context ('I know you don't care. Just trying to deflect since you were proved wrong'). Safety allegation about supervision at Eli's household. Jun 26: Olivia fell at park and bruised her arm — cooperative reporting, no allegation against Eli. ARC-RF14-001 signal 5.

primary_flags.description: ROW-7729: 'Also Olivia came home with bruises on her legs from Milo throwing water balloons at her and hitting her really hard with them.' ROW-7730: 'Make sure you watch him better.' Melissa reporting bruises sustained at Eli's household (Milo = child at Eli's household). Safety allegation about supervision quality delivered in hostile framing (ROW-7728: 'although I know you don't care. Just simply trying to deflect since you were proved wrong and now look stupid'). Hostile delivery context suggests weaponized framing but genuine bruise report.

arc_updates.event: RF14-S-006: Milo water balloon bruise report. Signal count now 5. Pattern: Melissa reports injuries/safety concerns about Eli's household in hostile framing. WATCHING → approaching ACTIVE threshold.
